title: The dorsal aortic compartment is a developmental source of brown adipose tissue in mice
author: Secener, Kerim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We FACS-sorted Osr1-expressing cells (Osr1 GCE/+) from 14 E9.5 and 6 E11.5 mouse embryos and analyzed their gene expression profiles using single-cell RNA sequencing. The data was processed and integrated using Seurat v3. The sample and annotation informations can be accessed via the " time " and " annotations " columns respectively.
steps_raw: We FACS-sorted Osr1-expressing cells (Osr1 GCE/+) from 14 E9.5 and 6 E11.5 mouse embryos and analyzed their gene expression profiles using single-cell RNA sequencing. The data was processed and integrated using Seurat v3. The sample and annotation informations can be accessed via the " time " and " annotations " columns respectively.
